company.name: United Airlines Holdings, Inc.
company.security: United Airlines Holdings, Inc. - Common Stock

commentary: FY 2025: PS 0.49x, operating profit 4.71B, normalized NI proxy 3.21B.
Normalized net income proxy growth is 6.58% YoY, trend improving.
Normalized P/E proxy is 9.04x based on current market cap.
5Y market-cap payback ratio is 63.92% using 3Y geometric revenue growth.
methodology: Fee-adjusted net income proxy = net income - stock-based compensation expense.
Normalized net income proxy = fee-adjusted net income proxy - absolute special items.
5Y market-cap payback ratio = projected next 5 years normalized NI proxy sum / current market cap.
Projection growth uses 3Y geometric revenue growth.
